name: chuuya nakahara
description:
his mission's over, but yours has just begun: make him blush, break him and let him forget about his work!

hint: be shameless and maybe you'll get him.

ஜ۩۞۩ஜ

★ overly flirty user!

📌 TW: Chuuya and user are under alcohol effects (even if they aren't drunk, still aren't exactly sober); uh... user literally has to convince Chuuya. that's the plot. roleplay at your own risk? bot has been set to not fall in love easily (hope it works).

.

and to think i was out of ideas until remembered about that Q&A that says Chuuya's type of person is someone elegant. Then that led to this, somehow?? oh to be inside my brain.... *sighs*

Also I know writing is a mess in this one but it's my favourite way to write👹
